decision.title: Primary CTA is Order-a-box
decision.summary: Operator chose live commerce in v1 — Square Orders + Payments scope is in-flight, not just lead-capture. Affects Phase 4 size + Square SDK surface area.

decision.title: Use existing photos + flag lifestyle gap
decision.summary: 27 SKU photos exist; documentary lifestyle imagery (2sranch.com style) does not. Don't block launch on photo shoot — ship with placeholders for hero/story slots, source/commission later.

decision.title: Submodule + monorepo workspace-linked
decision.summary: Operator wants own repo for 7greens AND monorepo package consumption. Submodule pattern serves both. Future-proof for when gad-visual-context publishes to npm and 7greens can detach.

decision.title: UPAEC images: vision-categorize then landing pulls copy/images by category
decision.summary: UPAEC landing images (32 farm photos in sites/upaec/public/images + gad media scoped to upaec) must be CATEGORIZED by what's actually IN them -- requires a vision step (caption/classify each image via a vision model: local VLM through Ollama/opencode backend, or the configured cloud backend). Pipeline: (1) caption/classify each image -> category tags (e.g. produce, farm-landscape, people, events, boxes); (2) persist tags in gad media metadata for upaec; (3) the landing page pulls images BY CATEGORY for specific sections/copies. Operator: 'we need some way of seeing what is in the image to categorize it.' This is the bridge from raw photos to a content-driven landing.

decision.title: UPAEC commerce = Square (full store v1); env pulled from Vercel
decision.summary: UPAEC is ALREADY on Square. Commerce backend = Square, NOT Shopify/Payload/Woo. Products/listings/catalog come FROM Square (Square Catalog API); checkout + payments + recurring subscriptions via Square. v1 target = FULL STORE (cart + checkout + payments + subscriptions), not lead-capture-only. (Payload was only suggested because the stakeholder requirements doc listed it; superseded -- no CMS, use Square.) Environment: the Vercel project (7greens) already HAS the env vars (Square keys etc.) -- pull them via 'vercel env pull' rather than re-provisioning. Partner co-sell (2S Ranch, Southern Sunny Acres) must work with Square's embed/checkout story. Phase 272 builds against Square.

decision.title: UPAEC commerce build spec (final): Square Web Payments + Subscriptions + existing catalog; Clerk auth; Supabase app data
decision.summary: Finalizes D-420. CHECKOUT = Square Web Payments SDK (in-page card + Apple/Google Pay, mobile+desktop optimized). SUBSCRIPTIONS = Square Subscriptions API (recurring boxes). CATALOG = pull the EXISTING Square catalog AS-IS (boxes/variations/add-ons already configured) via Square Catalog API + official 'square' Node SDK server-side (SQUARE_* keys already in Vercel, dev+prod). AUTH = Clerk in the UPAEC tenant (D-425); Square customer linked to the Clerk user. APP DATA (delivery zones, ZIP->route rules, cutoff times, pickup scheduling) = Supabase Postgres (provision a Supabase project + keys; ZIP rules may start as config then migrate). FLOW: browse catalog -> pick box size + add-ons -> delivery OR pickup + ZIP validate (day + cutoff) -> checkout (Web Payments) -> one-time or Square subscription. Then notifications (Resend email + SMS) + partner co-sell + events per roadmap 07-10. Vision-categorize the 32 landing images (D-417) and wire into copy.
